elite_company.label: Elite Company
elite_company.description: This Battle Company may only have up to {maxSize} members rather than the normal 15.

large_company.label: Large Company
large_company.description: This Battle Company may have up to {maxSize} members rather than the normal 15.

mercenary_ambush.label: Mercenary Ambush
mercenary_ambush.description: Goblin Mercenaries treat a Hero model with the Mercenary Ambush special rule exactly as if they were a Goblin Mercenary Captain for the purposes of the Mercenary Ambush special rule.
